prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MULTI-COLOR-HEADLAMP-FL8219-5 Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 350 Lumen Multi Color Tilting Head Lamp Camping Garden Hiking Description: The ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 5 Watt or 350 Lumen Head Lamp is a must-have for any occasion whether you are working in dark, cramped spaces or wish to read a book in the darkness of night while camping, this headlamp will suit all your needs. The lamp can be adjusted to the best position for optimum lighting.

The light also has a dual switch that can either change the color or the lighting. The three colors are White, Red, and Green. The three lighting settings are High, Low, and Strobe. There is a multitude of activities that can be used with this light. You could take it camping, lighten a crawl space, or lighten up your path during a walk at night.

Requires 3 AAA batteries (not included). Search Terms: backpacking boating hiking camping emergency Features: - FEATURES - 4 in 1 Multi Color Adjustable Head Lamp - BRIGHTNESS - 5 Watt or 350 Lumen | Requires 3 AAA Batteries (Not Included) - ADJUSTABLE - Tilting Head to give optimum advantage - BEAM RANGE - 300 FT - DUAL SWITCH - LED Color (Red, Green, White) and 3 Stages (High, Low, Strobe) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 Multi Color 350 Lumen Headlamp

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 350 Lumen Multi Color Tilting Head Lamp

anthropic.title_differentiation: 350 Lumen, Tilting Head, Dual Switch, Red Green White LED, High Low Strobe, 300 FT Beam Range

openai.title_differentiation: 300 Ft Beam Range, Dual Switch Red Green White, High Low Strobe, Tilting Head, 3 AAA Batteries, Camping Hiking Emergency
